_comment: Copy this file to ragflow_folder_mappings.json and fill in local folder paths, dataset IDs, and profile names for your environment. The runtime ragflow_folder_mappings.json file is intentionally gitignored.

business-reference.description: Stage 2 research reference library. Put reusable business background, prior research, and internal reference materials here.
business-reference.migration_note: If this folder contains PDFs, configure the target RAGFlow dataset or ingestion pipeline with PDF parser = MinerU before syncing.

style-reference.description: Stage 6 style reference library. Use for final-delivery structure, wording, and style alignment.
style-reference.migration_note: If this folder contains PDFs, configure the target RAGFlow dataset or ingestion pipeline with PDF parser = MinerU before syncing.
